name: Animation
description: Play and control animations embedded in 3D models with configurable playback settings. This behavior enables you to bring life to your 3D models by playing their built-in animations such as character movements, mechanical operations, or environmental effects.
documentation:
## Animation
Play animations embedded in 3D models.

### Settings
- **Animation** - Select from the model's available animations
- **Loop** - Repeat the animation continuously
- **Speed** - Playback speed multiplier (0-100)

### Tips
- Only visible for objects that have animations
- Use **Start on Trigger** to play animations on events
- Great for ambient animations (spinning fans, waving flags)
- Combine with Trigger for interactive animated objects
author: stemstudio

startOnTrigger.name: Start on Trigger
startOnTrigger.description: When enabled, the animation only plays when activated by a trigger event instead of playing automatically on load.

animation.name: Animation
animation.description: Selects which animation clip from the 3D model to play. The list is auto-populated from the model's embedded animations.

loop.name: Loop
loop.description: When enabled, the animation repeats continuously. When disabled, the animation plays once and stops on the last frame.

speed.name: Speed
speed.description: Playback speed multiplier for the animation. 1 is normal speed, 0.5 is half speed, and 2 is double speed.
